subtasks.description: Call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix with portfolio_dict to identify high correlations/clusters
completion_evidence: Correlation matrix: Average correlation 0.238; high clusters - semiconductors (CRDO-AVGO 0.673, CRDO-ARM 0.579, AVGO-ARM 0.571, CRDO-MTSI 0.663, CRDO-MU 0.585, AVGO-MTSI 0.599, AVGO-MU 0.597, ARM-MTSI 0.626, ARM-MU 0.595, MTSI-MU 0.577); utilities (AEE-CMS 0.733, AEE-WEC 0.788); REITs (FR-STAG 0.84, FR-TRNO 0.867, STAG-TRNO 0.794); bonds (IGSB-VCSH 0.818); software (APP-PLTR 0.509); commodities (SGDM-SLVR 0.827, NLR-OKLO 0.75). Low corrs to DGNX (~0.01 avg). Identifies tech/semi as risk cluster, utilities/REITs as defensive clusters.

Subtask 2d completed: Correlation matrix called and analyzed; key clusters identified (semi/tech high corr 0.5-0.7, utilities 0.7+, REITs 0.8+, bonds 0.8); average corr 0.238; hotspots: CRDO with semi peers >0.6, AEE-CMS 0.733, FR-TRNO 0.867. Supports diversification needs in tech.

subtasks.description: Call portfolio_exposure_calculator with portfolio_dict (gross, net, long, short)
completion_evidence: Subtask 2e completed: portfolio_exposure_calculator called for net (0.93), gross (0.93), long (0.93), short (0.0). All long-only portfolio, 93% invested, net/gross exposure 93%, no shorts, compliant with bounds (gross ≤1).

subtasks.description: Call portfolio_stress_test with portfolio_dict for crash, rate shock, inflation, correlation breakdown scenarios
completion_evidence: Subtask 2k completed: portfolio_stress_test results show vulnerabilities - historical hot CPI shock -4.24%, Powell hawkish -3.12%, tariff crash -7.73%, credit crunch -20.73%, fed overtight -7.2%; strengths in tariff rally +6.59%, stagflation +3.7%; correlation breakdown increases avg corr from 0.238 to 0.252; top risks from semi/tech in crashes (NVDA/APP -0.45%/-0.35% in CPI), banks/utilities in credit stress. Confirms need to lower beta/corr via diversification.

subtasks.description: Add synthesized evidence of key risk drivers, correlation hotspots, exposures; update task status
completion_evidence: Optional 2l: Parallel execution not needed as tools run sequentially; 2m synthesized: Key risk drivers - semi/software cluster (corr 0.5-0.7, 27% exposure, high vol 0.94 ann return 5.52); beta 1.035 >1; exposures net/gross 0.93; factor tilt quality +0.24 good for alpha, volatility -0.14 aids risk adj; VaR 4.13% portfolio, semi 1.2%; stress losses up to -20% in credit; hotspots utilities/REITs corr 0.7-0.8, DGNX low corr but high vol. Overall strong Sharpe 2.15 but needs lower beta/corr per prefs.

Baseline analytics: Portfolio performance - ann return 0.6872, vol 0.2379, Sharpe 2.1483, Sortino 4.2439, max DD -0.2042, beta 1.035 (from earlier call, unavailable in retry); returns metrics - ann total return 0.6642, vol 0.2621; exposures - net/gross/long 0.93, short 0.0; industry concentration - semiconductors 0.171, electric_utilities 0.101, software 0.101; group performances - software ann return 5.5195 high vol 0.9419, equity_etfs 1.0473; ticker performances - high Sharpe in SLVR (2.4787), PLTR (2.1072), NRG (1.8292); factor tilts - quality +0.2426, value -0.1003, volatility -0.1372; VaR portfolio 0.04129, industry max semiconductors 0.01196; stress tests - hot CPI -4.24%, Japan rally +0.82%, Powell hawk -3.12%, SVB -0.59%, tariff rally +6.59%, tariff crash -7.73%, credit crunch -20.73%, credit stress -14.55%, energy shock -2.96%, fed overtight -7.2%, stagflation +3.7%, sticky inflation -2.02%. Key risks: high tech/semi exposure (34%), correlation hotspots in semi/software (0.6+), beta >1, poor stress in credit/banking scenarios.

Subtasks 2f-2k completed from prior calls: industry concentration (semi 17.1%, utilities 10.1%, software 10.1%, all <35%); group perf (software high return 5.52 but vol 0.94, ETFs 1.05); ticker perf (SLVR Sharpe 2.48, PLTR 2.11); factor tilts (quality +0.24, volatility -0.14); VaR portfolio 4.13%, industry max semi 1.2%; stress tests show vulnerabilities in credit crunch (-20.73%), tariff crash (-7.73%), fed overtight (-7.2%), strong in tariff rally (+6.59%).

tasks.description: Identify weak/high-risk positions and source diversified replacements aligned with objectives

subtasks.description: Flag candidates to trim/exit based on high beta/correlation, poor risk-adjusted returns, adverse fundamentals/news
completion_evidence: Flagged weak/high-risk positions: EQIX (8.1% alloc, Sharpe 0.25, 1Y return -9.1%, high debt 1.55, news volatility/rent defaults - trim to 4%); IIPR (3.7%, negative return -4%, Sharpe 0.00, high DD -62.8%, tenant defaults news - exit); CRDO (1.2%, high corr 0.6+ with semi, vol high, Sharpe 1.77 but DD -60% - trim to 0.5%); ARM (2.6%, beta 2.52, vol 70.8%, Sharpe 0.98 - trim to 1.5%); DGNX (0.9%, extreme vol 836%, low corr but poor fundamentals/negative equity - exit); FR (1.3%, Sharpe 0.29, low return 8.35% - trim to 0.5%); STAG (1.3%, Sharpe 0.18, low return - trim to 0.5%); TRNO (1.8%, Sharpe 0.11 - trim to 0.5%). Rationale: high beta (>2), corr clusters (semi 17% total), poor Sharpe (<0.5), adverse news (defaults, volatility); frees ~10% for diversification.

Weak/high-risk flags: High beta (>1.5): ARM (2.52), APP (2.51), NVDA (2.19), CRDO (high corr 0.67 with AVGO); poor Sharpe (<0.5): EQIX (0.25), IIPR (0.00), STAG (0.18), TRNO (0.11), FR (0.29); adverse fundamentals/news: IIPR tenant defaults/rent issues, DGNX negative equity/high vol, EQIX high debt 1.55/low growth, CRDO high DD -60%; high corr clusters: semi/tech (0.6+), REITs (0.8+). Candidates to trim/exit: EQIX (trim 8.1%->4%), IIPR (exit 3.7%), CRDO (trim 1.2%->0%), ARM (trim 2.6%->1.5%), DGNX (exit 0.9%), FR/STAG/TRNO (trim to 0.5% each). Frees ~8% for low beta replacements.

Expanded weak/high-risk flags from full analysis: High beta (>1.5): ARM (2.52), APP (2.51), NVDA (2.19), CRDO (high corr), MU (beta high vol), MTSI (beta 1.98); poor Sharpe (<0.5): EQIX (0.25), IIPR (0.00), STAG (0.18), TRNO (0.11), FR (0.29), CMS (0.95 low return); adverse fundamentals/news: IIPR tenant defaults/rent issues (news on dividend cut risk), DGNX negative equity/high vol 836%, EQIX high debt 1.55/low growth 1.39% revenue, CRDO high DD -60% vol, ARM high vol 70.8%; high corr clusters: semi/tech (0.6+ AVGO-ARM 0.57, CRDO-MU 0.58), REITs (0.8+ FR-TRNO 0.87); utilities (AEE-CMS 0.73). Candidates to trim/exit: Exit IIPR (3.7%, negative return, defaults), DGNX (0.9%, extreme vol, negative equity); trim EQIX (8.1%->3%), FR (1.3%->0.5%), STAG (1.3%->0.5%), TRNO (1.8%->0.5%), ARM (2.6%->1%), CRDO (1.2%->0%), MU (1.6%->1%), MTSI (1.8%->1%). Frees ~12% for diversified low-beta replacements in staples/energy/materials to lower portfolio beta/corr.

subtasks.description: Call stock_screener to find low-correlation, high-quality/momentum, moderate-beta candidates; include sector diversification constraints
For each candidate, call get_ticker_performance_and_risk to vet risk/return profile
Build test portfolio_dicts by adding candidates at small weights; call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix and calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index to gauge marginal correlation/beta impact
Cull to a shortlist balancing factor tilts, diversification, liquidity sanity (if data available, else flag risk)
Record evidence and status

tasks.description: Construct optimized portfolio and iterate until objectives/constraints are satisfied

subtasks.description: Draft initial rebalanced weights within bounds (0–0.15 long, -0.10–0 short; ≥0.005 abs); enforce sector ≤35% gross and single-name ≤20% gross
Call portfolio_exposure_calculator and portfolio_industry_concentration to validate gross/net and diversification caps

Call calculate_portfolio_performance, calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix, calculate_portfolio_returns_metrics, calculate_portfolio_factor_tilts, portfolio_VaR_calculator, portfolio_stress_test on new portfolio_dict
Iterate small adjustments to improve Sharpe/Sortino, reduce beta/correlation, and improve drawdown resilience; re-run 5b–5c; parallelize where possible via check_parallel_execution_options
Finalize optimized portfolio that meets preferences with documented trade-offs
Record iteration evidence and status

tasks.description: Memory logging and pre-final compliance checks

subtasks.description: Call episodic_remember to log final optimized portfolio_dict and a concise 'why it changed' summary (hard constraint)
Call get_completion_analysis to validate task readiness and confidence
Call check_plan_completion_status to confirm overall plan completion
Mark tasks complete
Assemble strict JSON output with the entire new portfolio: allocations (4–6 decimals), positions, and one-sentence thesis per position
Add 'changes' section detailing added/removed/adjusted with brief rationale; ensure weights and constraints satisfied; report actual gross/net
Output the strict JSON as the final answer (no prose outside JSON)
